title: Performance Metrics Path
description: Build fluency in Performance Metrics inside Evaluation Metrics by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: ROC Curve (Receiver Operating Characteristic)
steps.summary: ROC Curve (Receiver Operating Characteristic) belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Performance Metrics. Start after Receiver Operating Characteristic and ROC Curve.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: AUC
steps.summary: AUC belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Performance Metrics. Compare it with ROC AUC and Normalized AUC. It opens into AUC-ROC and ROC AUC.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Scoring
steps.summary: Scoring belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Performance Metrics. Compare it with AUC and ROC Curve. It opens into Antecedent Scoring and similarity scoring.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: ROC Curve
steps.summary: ROC Curve belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Performance Metrics. Compare it with AUC-ROC Curve and ROC Curve (Receiver Operating Characteristic). It opens into AUC-ROC Curve and Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) Curve.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: AUC-ROC Curve
steps.summary: AUC-ROC Curve belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Performance Metrics. Start after AUC-ROC and ROC AUC.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Zero-shot Evaluation
steps.summary: Zero-shot Evaluation belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Performance Metrics. Start after Evaluation and Zero-1-to-3.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Area Under the Curve
steps.summary: Area Under the Curve belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Performance Metrics. Compare it with AUC (Area Under the Curve) and AUC (Area Under Curve). It opens into AUC (Area Under Curve) and Area Under the Curve (AUC).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: AUC-Maximization Loss
steps.summary: AUC-Maximization Loss belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Performance Metrics. Start after AUC and Loss.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
